# Test basic fuzzing functionality
# This tests that the fuzzing system can generate and execute scripttest scripts

# Set up a test server
mcp-server-start testserver -- go run ./testdata/test_servers/echo_server.go

# Enable fuzzing mode
env FUZZING_ENABLED=1

# Test that FuzzScriptTest function exists and can be called
exec go test -v -run TestFuzzScriptTestAPI ./fuzzing
stdout 'PASS'
! stderr 'undefined'

# Test that fuzzing generates valid scripts
exec go run ./testdata/fuzzing_tools/generate_sample.go
stdout 'Generated script'
stdout '-- txtar --'
stdout 'exec '
stdout 'mcp-'
